words.def: something superior in quality or condition or effect
a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms
words.zh: n. 樹, 木料, 樹狀物

words.def: a general name for alcoholic beverages made by fermenting a cereal (or mixture of cereals) flavored with hops
the starting place for each hole on a golf course
words.zh: n. T字形, T字形之物, 發球區, 球座, 目標

words.def: any of numerous hairy-bodied insects including social and solitary species
the money risked on a gamble
